title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Dulux Decorator Centre

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Dulux Decorator Centre
jsonLd.description:
We at Dulux Decorator Centre are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Patna. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dulux Decorator Centre:
Dulux Decorator Centre is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dulux Decorator Centre!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
